acceptance_criteria.text: Ship a no-Python ForgeLink-owned MCP server that exposes tools, resources, and prompts for external agentic apps to communicate with humans through ForgeLink.
Provide ForgeWire-style persona and communication skills for private, concise, non-social agent-human messages.
Provide installable MCP configuration templates for ForgeWire/Fabric, VS Code Copilot MCP, Claude Code, and Codex.
Test MCP protocol surfaces and prove a tool call can create a ForgeLink agent-channel message through the local API.
Document security boundaries for token loading, loopback-only use, redaction, approval actions, and app installation.
